metadata.name: Gift — Nocturnal Hunger destroys creature, grants Food token to chosen opponent
metadata.description: Tests the Gift mechanic (CR 702.174a-b) using Nocturnal Hunger ({2}{B}, Instant, Gift a Food). P1 casts Nocturnal Hunger targeting P2's Bladetusk Boar, promising the gift to P3. At resolution, per CR 702.174b, the gift resolves first: P3 creates a Food token. Then the main effect executes: Bladetusk Boar is destroyed. Because the gift was promised, the 'if gift wasn't promised, lose 2 life' clause is skipped (CR 702.174j). Final state: P3 has a Food token on their battlefield, Bladetusk Boar is in P2's graveyard, P1's life total is unchanged at 40.
metadata.generation_notes: CR 702.174a: Gift is a keyword ability that lets the caster promise an opponent a benefit. CR 702.174b: If the gift was promised, the chosen opponent receives the specified gift (here, a Food token) before the spell's other effects execute. CR 702.174j: The conditional 'if the gift wasn't promised' clause means P1 does NOT lose 2 life because P1 did promise the gift. The spell costs {2}{B}: generic=2, black=1. P1 has 2 generic (colorless) + 1 black mana available. P2 controls Bladetusk Boar (3/2 Intimidate) as the destroy target. gift_opponent field uses player name string ("p3"), consistent with assist_player and other player-name fields.

script.step_note: P1 casts Nocturnal Hunger with gift promised to P3, targeting P2's Bladetusk Boar. Spell resolves: P3 gets a Food token, Bladetusk Boar is destroyed, P1 does not lose life.

actions.description: Initial: Nocturnal Hunger in P1 hand, Bladetusk Boar on P2 battlefield, P3 battlefield empty
actions.note: Setup verified. P1 has {B}{2} in pool. P2 controls Bladetusk Boar as the destroy target.
CR 601.2: P1 casts Nocturnal Hunger paying {2}{B}. CR 702.174a: P1 promises the gift to P3. Target is P2's Bladetusk Boar.

actions.description: After casting: Nocturnal Hunger on stack, P1 hand empty
actions.note: CR 601.2: Spell moved from hand to stack, awaiting priority passes.
CR 116.3: All four players pass priority — top of stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 702.174b: Gift was promised to P3 — P3 creates a Food token before the spell's other effects. Food token is an artifact with '{2}, {T}, Sacrifice: You gain 3 life.'
CR 701.7a: Nocturnal Hunger's main effect resolves — Bladetusk Boar is destroyed, moving from battlefield to P2's graveyard.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Nocturnal Hunger resolves. CR 702.174b: Gift effect executes first (Food to P3), then destroy effect. CR 702.174j: Gift was promised, so the 'lose 2 life' conditional is skipped.

actions.description: Final: P3 has a Food token, Bladetusk Boar in P2 graveyard, P1 life unchanged at 40, stack empty
actions.note: CR 702.174b: P3 received the Food token. CR 701.7a: Bladetusk Boar was destroyed. CR 702.174j: P1 did not lose 2 life because the gift was promised.
